lessons.detail: Kubernetes. Kubeadm bilan Kubernetes cluster yaratish. Kubernetes namespaces.

lessons.title: Kubernetes HA & NFS Storage
lessons.detail: Kubernetes High available setup. Storage with NFS server.

lessons.title: K8s API Load Balancing & Ingress

lessons.title: Ingress, ConfigMap, Secret, Cert-Manager
lessons.detail: Ingress. ConfigMap. Secret. Cert-Manager.

lessons.title: Cert-Manager HTTP01/DNS01 & External DNS
lessons.detail: Ingress + Cert-manager (HTTP01 and DNS01 method). External DNS with DigitalOcean

lessons.title: GitOps with ArgoCD: Pull vs Push
lessons.detail: App deployment to Kubernetes: pull vs push method. GitOps: ArgoCD. ArgoCD architecture.

lessons.title: K8s CI/CD: kubectl, ArgoCD, Probes
lessons.detail: CI/CD for Kubernetes. Push method with kubectl and pull method with ArgoCD. Readiness and liveness probes.

lessons.title: Affinity, Anti-Affinity & Resource Limits
lessons.detail: Kubernets: affinity, anti-affinity, node and pod affinity. CPU and Memory requests, limits.

lessons.title: Pod Distribution Budget, Operators & CloudNativePG
lessons.detail: Kubernetes. Pod Distribution Budget. Node cordon, drain. Stateful workloads: Operators. Demo with CloudNativePG operator. Intro to Volume Snapshots.

lessons.title: Volume Snapshots, ArgoCD App of Apps, Taints
lessons.detail: Kubernetes. Volume Snapshots. ArgoCD - App Of Apps Pattern. Taints and tolerations.

lessons.title: HashiCorp Vault Setup & ACL Policies
lessons.detail: Secret management: Hashicorp Vault. Installation, secret management, ACL policies, High Available setup.

lessons.title: Vault-K8s Integration, External Secrets, RBAC
lessons.detail: Secret management. Vault to K8s integration. External Secrets Operator. Network policies. Role-based access control (RBAC).

lessons.title: K8s Autoscaling: HPA, Cluster Autoscaler, KEDA
lessons.detail: Kubernetes autoscaling: Horizontal Pod Autoscaling (HPA), Cluster Autoscaler, Kubernetes-based Event Driven Autoscaler (KEDA). Writing own helm chart.

lessons.title: Migrating Helm Charts to ArgoCD
lessons.detail: Migrating infra helm charts' setup to argocd. Debugging and fixing problems with hanging resources patching finalizers.

lessons.title: Full K8s Infra on DigitalOcean with Vault & Celery
lessons.detail: Full k8s infra from zero on DigitalOcean. Deploy django app with integration with Vault to K8s. Writing additional configs for celery.

lessons.title: Celery Autoscaling with KEDA & Cost Optimization
lessons.detail: Celery workers autoscaling with Redis and KEDA + Cluster Autoscaler. Celery configuration for one pod per task. Cost optimization.

lessons.title: Private Infra Intro & Harbor Registry via Ansible
lessons.detail: Private infra introduction. Prepare initial setup ansible role. Installation of harbor registry with custom ansible role.

lessons.title: Network Segmentation & RKE2/Rancher Intro
lessons.detail: Private infra. Network divide methods theory (Firewall, VLAN, VXLAN based). K8s certified distributions. RKE2 introduction, setup, configuration. Rancher introduction.

lessons.title: Networking Fundamentals & pfSense Setup
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Networking: How Hub, Switch, Router work. Layer 2 vs Layer 3 switch. PfSense setup from zero.

lessons.title: pfSense: DHCP, DNS, NTP & Linux Bridge
lessons.detail: Private Infra. PfSense configuration: DHCP server, Gateway, DNS server, NTP server. Broadcast domain. Linux bridge.

lessons.title: Network Segmentation: pfSense & OpenNebula
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Network segmentation with pfSense and OpenNebula. Physical (multiple LANs) and virtual (with VLANs) segmentation.

lessons.title: pfSense OpenVPN & Interface Troubleshooting
lessons.detail: Pfsense OpenVPN setup. Break and fix pfSense interfaces. Full ready network to setup apps.

lessons.title: Rancher HA Install & Downstream Clusters
lessons.detail: Rancher installation (high available) on 3 node RKE2 cluster. Rancher functionalities. Provisioning downstream clusters from Rancher.

lessons.title: Rancher Downstream Clusters & OIDC Intro
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Rancher provision downstream clusters. Oauth and OIDC introduction. Setup and configure infra cluster.

lessons.title: Keycloak on K8s & CPU Passthrough
lessons.detail: Private infra. Keycloak setup on K8s using operator. Solving virtualization's CPU passthrough problems.

lessons.title: Keycloak-ArgoCD Integration & OIDC Workflow
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Keycloak setup and integration with ArgoCD. OIDC workflow explained.

lessons.title: ArgoCD RBAC, HAProxy/Keepalived HA & Harbor Auth
lessons.detail: Private infra. ArgoCD RBAC sync with Keycloak groups. High available load balancing with HAProxy and Keepalived. Setup harbor in K8s and integration with Keycloak for auth.

lessons.title: Harbor with Trivy & MinIO S3 Architecture
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Harbor: registry, proxy cache, robot account, vulnerability scan with Trivy. MinIO S3: architecture, RAID 0,1,5,6, deploy in K8s, overview of UI console.

lessons.title: Keycloak OIDC for MinIO/Rancher & Nexus Setup
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Integrate Keycloak OIDC auth to MinIO and Rancher. Change Harbor image storage to S3 MinIO. Sonatype Nexus setup and configuration (unfortunately, the video recording ended abruptly at this point. However, installation instructions are below.).
lessons.note: Video recording ended abruptly at this point; installation instructions given as text only.

lessons.title: Nexus Config, Etcd Backup & Postgres HA (Part 1)
lessons.detail: Private Infra. Sonatype Nexus configuration info. Etcd backup to s3 MinIO for kubernetes cluster with Rancher. High available postgres with patroni, etcd, haproxy, keepalived theory and setup: part 1.

lessons.title: Postgres HA: Switchover, Replicas & Backup (Part 2)
lessons.detail: Private infra. Postgres HA setup: HAProxy configuration, switchover test. Async, sync, standby sync replicas. Info about postgres backup with Barman and pgBackRest. The end of the course.
